name: nodii-outbox-dispatcher
summary: Nodii Pattern 3 producer-side outbox drainer — define_dispatcher + start_dispatcher + single-active SET-NX-EX lease (D209) + FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED drain + XADD to Redis Streams + current_hwm + 24h-unpublished ops-alert sweep (D401: no publish-side DLQ) + graceful drain + migrate-gen. Symmetric peer of nodii-replica-consumer.
